title: Mini-Batch Gradient Descent Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of mini-batch gradient descent, showing how data is divided, processed, and used to update model parameters.
relationships: Full Dataset is shuffled and split into Mini-Batches
Model Parameters are used to compute Loss for a Mini-Batch
Loss calculation leads to Gradient Computation
Gradient is used to update Parameters
Updated Model is checked for Convergence
If not converged, process repeats with next Mini-Batch
If converged, final model is output
